string.text: Find %s for Stepan
You need to bring Stepan the tools so he can perform equipment upgrades.

You know, buddy, I’m actually a pretty good technician. I can repair weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I would, if I had decent tools. But where the hell am I supposed to get them around here? Maybe you can help me get a simple set?
I need a basic set of tools for heavy work. It should include tools and oils for working with weapons. If you can get them, I’ll be grateful and might even pay you!... Probably.
Great, dude! Oh, sorry, I don’t have anything to pay you with. But I can offer you a good discount!
Find %s for Stepan
You need to bring Stepan the tools for fine work. He needs a more complete set to perform more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, buddy, if you agree to get me a more complete set, I’ll give you an even bigger discount. Will you help me out, friend?
I need tools for fine work. It should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

Oh wow, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn it, I’m going to be successful! ... Unless, of course, I screw up this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Stepan
You need to bring Stepan %s. He needs a unique set of tools to perform even more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, man, if you find something worth it, I’ll give you a discount!
I need tools for calibration. They should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

No way...! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn it, I’m going to be successful!... Unless, of course, I screw up this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Barkas
You need to bring Barkas the tools so he can perform equipment upgrades.

You know, buddy, I’m actually a pretty good technician. I can repair weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I would, if I had decent tools. But where the hell am I supposed to get them around here? Maybe you can help me get a simple set?
I need a basic set of tools for heavy work. It should include tools and oils for working with weapons. If you can get them, I’ll be grateful and might even pay you!... Probably.
Great, dude! Oh, sorry, I don’t have anything to pay you with. But I can offer you a good discount!
Find %s for Barkas
You need to bring Barkas the tools for fine work. He needs a more complete set to perform more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, buddy, if you agree to get me a more complete set, I’ll give you an even bigger discount. Will you help me out, friend?
I need tools for fine work. It should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

Oh wow, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn it, I’m going to be successful! ... Unless, of course, I screw up this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Barkas
You need to bring Barkas %s. He needs a unique set of tools to perform even more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, man, if you find something worth it, I’ll give you a discount!
I need tools for calibration. They should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

No way...! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn it, I’m going to be successful!... Unless, of course, I screw up this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Antibiotic
You need to find a set and bring it to medic Antibiotic.
I need a good set of medical tools. I can quickly patch up light injuries, but for anything more serious than a scalpel, I need something more.
I need a good set of medical tools. I can quickly patch up light injuries, but for anything more serious than a scalpel, I need something more.
Thanks, friend! These tools will save many lives. Thanks again for the tools.
